description: The independent agent-commerce protocol for AI-agent checkout on any online store.
name: llc.facet/ucp-shopping

headers.description: Optional Facet KYA bearer, an ES256 JWT from the default issuer https://issuer.facet.llc (or another issuer advertised at /.well-known/agents.txt KYA-Issuers). Not required for tools/list or catalog discovery; required for gated tools/call, per the endpoint's agents.txt (MCP-Auth: kya-bearer).
headers.name: Authorization

title: Facet UCP Shopping
